title: S + need not / don't need to + V

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 情態動詞 need not + 動詞原形，表示不必做某事

formulas.formula: S + don't/doesn't need to + V (原形)
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 一般動詞 don't/doesn't need to + 動詞原形，表示不必做某事

explanation: 「need not」為情態動詞用法，後接動詞原形，無人稱變化，主要用於正式文體；「don't need to」為一般動詞用法，有人稱變化（I/you/we/they don't need to；he/she/it doesn't need to），更常見於日常口語和現代英文。兩者皆表示「無必要」或「不必」之意。注意：need not 與 must not 意思截然不同，前者表非必要，後者表禁止。過去式為 needed not 或 didn't need to。

examples.eng: You need not worry about the exam because you've studied hard.
examples.chi: 你不必擔心考試，因為你已經認真讀書了。

examples.eng: She doesn't need to take the bus since her father will drive her to school.
examples.chi: 她不必搭公車，因為她爸爸會開車送她上學。

examples.eng: We need not attend the meeting if it's not important for our project.
examples.chi: 如果會議對我們的專案不重要，我們就不必參加。

examples.eng: The students don't need to submit their homework on Friday afternoon.
examples.chi: 學生們不必在星期五下午提交作業。

extension.tip: 判斷使用時：need not 較正式、文學性強，常見於書面英文或正式場合；don't need to 更口語化、現代，日常溝通更常見。若強調「被禁止」要用 must not；若強調「不必但可以做」用 need not/don't need to。

examples.test: You need not come early. vs. You must not come early.
examples.result: → 前者：不必提早來（可提早也可不提早）；後者：禁止提早來（不能提早）

examples.test: He doesn't need to call her vs. He needs not to call her.
examples.result: → 正確：doesn't need to；錯誤：need 為情態時不加 to，一般動詞才加 to

examples.test: We don't need to bring gifts. (現在) vs. We didn't need to bring gifts. (過去)
examples.result: → 過去式用 didn't need to，need not 通常只用現在式，少用過去

extension.note: 情態 need not 無人稱變化，一般 don't/doesn't need to 有人稱變化——這是兩種用法的核心區別。

parts: answer all the questions on the test.
Just focus on the main ones.
exercises.sentence: You need not answer all the questions on the test. Just focus on the main ones.
exercises.translation: 你不必回答考試上的所有題目。只需要專注於主要的題目。

parts: finish their projects by next week.
exercises.sentence: My students don't need to finish their projects by next week. We have more time.
exercises.translation: 我的學生不必在下週完成他們的專案。我們還有更多時間。

parts: If you have a car, you
exercises.sentence: If you have a car, you don't need to take the subway anymore.
exercises.translation: 如果你有車，你就不必再搭地鐵了。

parts: remind him again because he already knows the deadline.
exercises.sentence: We need not remind him again because he already knows the deadline.
exercises.translation: 我們不必再次提醒他，因為他已經知道截止期限了。
